ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Eggplants 68%, tomato and onion sauce 32% [onion, soya oil, water, tomato paste, olive oil 2% peeled tomatoes (chopped tomatoes, tomato juice, acidity regular: citric acid), salt, parsley, sugar, garlic, red pepper, black pepper, curry powder].
